title: Safa regional league kicks off this weekend
description: GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - With South Africans...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - With South Africans building up the festive season mood, the Safa Eden Regional League will be starting this coming weekend with games played across the region.","html":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - With South Africans building up the festive season mood, the Safa Eden Regional League will be starting this coming weekend with games played across the region."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The league's last games will be played in the first week of December before closing for the Christmas holiday season break, and will resume on 10 January 2026."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In the 2025/26 season, the Safa Eden Region extended the number of teams in its roster when Strikers Football Club (Plettenberg Bay) and Flying Eagles FC (Mossel Bay) were promoted to form a part of 18 regional teams.","html":"In the 2025/26 season, the Safa Eden Region extended the number of teams in its roster when Strikers Football Club (Plettenberg Bay) and Flying Eagles FC (Mossel Bay) were promoted to form a part of 18 regional teams."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The winners of the regional competition will gain a play-off spot to the semi-professional league, the Western Cape ABC Motsepe League.","html":"The winners of the regional competition will gain a play-off spot to the semi-professional league, the Western Cape ABC Motsepe League."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Other Safa Eden Regional League teams","html":"Other Safa Eden Regional League teams"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Oriented Birds FC (Plettenberg Bay, who bought the status of FC Benfica from Mossel Bay), Bitou Young Pirates (Plettenberg Bay), Black Cats FC (George), Simunye FC (George), Fast Eleven FC (George), Madibaz FC (George), Paris United FC (George), Sea Birds FC (Mossel Bay), Moonlight FC (Dysselsdorp), Infantry School (Oudtshoorn - relegated from the Western Cape ABC Motsepe Provincial League), De Rust United (Dysselsdorp), FC United (Knysna), Voota FC (Knysna), FC Rebels (Knysna), La liga (Knysna) and Smuts United (Knysna).","html":"Oriented Birds FC (Plettenberg Bay, who bought the status of FC Benfica from Mossel Bay), Bitou Young Pirates (Plettenberg Bay), Black Cats FC (George), Simunye FC (George), Fast Eleven FC (George), Madibaz FC (George), Paris United FC (George), Sea Birds FC (Mossel Bay), Moonlight FC (Dysselsdorp), Infantry School (Oudtshoorn - relegated from the Western Cape ABC Motsepe Provincial League), De Rust United (Dysselsdorp), FC United (Knysna), Voota FC (Knysna), FC Rebels (Knysna), La liga (Knysna) and Smuts United (Knysna)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Fixtures Saturday 29 November","html":"Fixtures Saturday 29 November"},{"type":"list","items":["De Rust United vs Flying Eagles, 10:00, Dysselsdorp Stadium","Fast Eleven vs Sea Birds, 10:00, Thembalethu Stadium","La liga vs Strikers, 10:00, Loerie Park Stadium","Smits United vs Infantry School, 10:00, Sedgefield","FC Rebels vs Moonlight at 10:00 Hornlee Stadium.","Bitou Young Pirates vs Madibaz FC, 10:00, Kwanokuthula Stadium A","Oriented Birds vs Black Cats, 10:00, Kwanokuthula Stadium B","FC United vs Simunye, 12:00, Loerie Park Stadium","Voota vs Paris United, 12:00 Safe Hub Stadium.","Fast Eleven vs Flying Eagles, 15:00, Thembalethu Stadium","De Rust United vs Sea Birds, 15:00, Dysselsdorp Stadium","Bitou Young Pirates vs Black Cats, 14:00, Kwanokuthula Stadium B","Oriented Birds vs Madibaz FC at 14:00 in Kwanokutulha Stadium A","Emits United vs Moonlight, 14:00, Sedgefield","FC Rebels vs Infantry School, 14:00, Hornlee Stadium","FC United vs Paris United, 16:00, Loerie Park Stadium","Voota vs Simunye, 16:00, Safe Hub (Knysna)"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Safa regional league kicks off this weekend
